title: Subtle Guardian Beams
description: Makes Guardian Beams more subtle. Perfect for clearing out ocean monuments. I recommend turning Particles to Decreased or Minimal to remove bubbles.
body:
This resource pack makes guardian beams more subtle. Its perfect for clearing out ocean monuments. I recommend turning Particles to Decreased or Minimal to remove bubbles.

When using the mod, it might say 'Resource Pack Outdated'. It is okay to use on any of the 1.21.x versions.
